opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just woke up covered in intensely itchy hives and terrible stomach cramps after having a steak for dinner.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The hives and stomach cramps started a few hours after dinner and keep getting worse, and now I feel dizzy and faint whenever I stand up. My wife is really worried.

symptom_narrative.onset: a few hours after eating steak for dinner — it began as itching all over
symptom_narrative.duration: several hours, and it has been building over the last hour and a half
symptom_narrative.character: intensely itchy raised welts and hives all over, bad cramping stomach pains, waves of nausea, and feeling faint and drained
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the itching and the cramps are really bad and I feel awful and completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: hives across my chest, stomach and upper arms; the cramps are all over my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the itching, the cramps and the faint feeling all came on together and have kept getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me dizzy and I feel like I might pass out
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: nausea, cramping stomach, feeling very tired and drained, dizzy and light-headed when I stand
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've never had anything like this before and I don't have any known allergies
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get off the couch because I feel so faint

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally healthy, no ongoing medical conditions

allergies_as_reported.substance: no previously known food or drug allergies

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse; spends a lot of time outdoors in bushland areas near home

objective_data_offered.value: widespread raised, itchy red welts and hives across the chest, stomach and upper arms
he looks flushed and sweaty, keeps clutching his stomach, and is restless and very uncomfortable
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's description over video, not a clinical examination

objective_data_offered.value: he goes dizzy and light-headed every time he stands and has to stay lying on the couch
